emails.body: Re: Deal #576468.1 572069.1 (4/6/2001 4/7/2001) I've modified these deals to read as follows: 572069 West Services buys from APX NP-15 On Peak 12 MW $245 for flow 4/6-4/7 Off Peak 12 MW $150 for flow 4/7 TOTAL MWH 480 576468 West Services buys from APX NP-15 Off Peak 12 MW $140 for flow 4/6 TOTAL MWH 96 Please let me know if this is correct. (I hope!) And don't hesitate to call me with questions or other deal corrections. I will be running between two different desks today, so if you can't reach me at my regular extension (503-464-7486), I can be reached at 503-464-3823. Thanks, Kate From: Chris H Foster 04/10/2001 07:52 AM
